DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allyssa Villanueva, esq. (510-897-9966) of Benjamin Law Group for Plaintiff.
Kate A. Golovanova, esq. (510-834-4350) of Boornazian, Jensen & Garthe and Edward Reid, esq. (714-918-7000) of Hall Griffin for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRIAN REED's DEMURRER TO Olusoji Fanoiki's 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT:

Defendant Brian Reed's demurrer to the second amended complaint's (SAC) first cause of action for sexual harassment is OVERRULED. The SAC alleges a continuing series of unauthorized entries, sexual advances with attempted physical contact, and unwanted sexual attention following a 2010 episode of attempted forced sexual contact. Liberally construed - as they must be at the pleading stage - the allegations do not run afoul of the two-year statute of limitations, and they support the element of severe and pervasive unwelcomed conduct of a sexual nature. (SAC 14, 17, 18, 20-23, 26, 34-35; Richards v. CH2M Hill, Inc. (2001) 26 Cal.4th 798, 823; Birschtein v. New United Motor Mfg., Inc. (2001) 92 Cal.App.4th 994; CCP 51.9.)

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
